prestazioni: Engine swap to a ZMZ-513.10 (4.25L V8, 125 HP stock) with a custom forged crankshaft from **SMZ (Serpukhov Motor Plant)** and **Mahle Motorsport** forged pistons (8.5:1 compression ratio for forced induction compatibility), paired with a **Garrett GT3582R turbocharger** (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a **Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate** for 1.2 bar boost pressure. Intercooled with a **GReddy Type-S front-mount intercooler** (custom 3.5" piping) and a **Walbro 450 LPH fuel pump** to support **ID1000x injectors** (Bosch 0280158107).

Full drivetrain reinforcement: **GAZ 66-specific reinforced transfer case** (from the GAZ-3308 Sadko military variant) with **ARB RD140 front and rear differentials** (4.10:1 gear ratio) and **Rugged Ridge heavy-duty CV joints**. Clutch upgrade to a **Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (ceramic-metallic friction material)** with a **South Bend billet flywheel** for the ZMZ-513.10.

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins TTX40 coilovers (24-way adjustable damping)** modified for GAZ 66 leaf spring mounts, paired with **Polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF1000K)** for the front axle and **Heavy Duty U-bolts from RuffStuff Specialties**. Braking system upgraded to **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (355mm rotors, front) and 4-piston calipers (330mm rotors, rear)** with **Ferodo DS2500 brake pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: Custom **Rocket Bunny-inspired widebody kit** fabricated from **1.5mm 5052 aluminum** (hand-rolled fenders with 4" flares) to accommodate **35x12.50R17 BFGoodrich KM3 tires** on **Method MR701 beadlock wheels (17x9, +12mm offset)**. Rear fender vents with **carbon fiber mesh inserts (from APR Performance)** for heat extraction.

Military-inspired **functional snorkel system** (custom-fabricated from **3" aluminum tubing**) with a **K&N 63-1561 intake filter** and **heat-wrapped exhaust manifold (DEI Titanium wrap)**. **Front bumper replacement with a custom steel winch bumper** (integrated **Warn Zeon 12-S winch**) and **PIAA 520 LED light pods** in a **D-Mount configuration**.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Sparco Pro ADV seats (carbon fiber shell)** mounted on **custom aluminum sliders**, **Alcantara-wrapped GAZ 66 steering wheel (from a GAZ-24 Volga)** with a **NRG Quick Release hub**, and a **Momo 80mm deep-dish shift knob** for the **Hurst Competition Plus shifter**. **Full custom roll cage (TIG-welded 1.75" DOM tubing)** with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses** and a **Defi BF Advance gauge cluster** (boost, oil temp, fuel pressure) mounted on a **custom aluminum dash panel**.
